rows.label: tev058001_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev058001_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev058001_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Mumun about the Bias.

rows.label: tev058001_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Mumun about recent developments.

rows.label: tev058001_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Mumun about the indigens in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0011
rows.name:
Mumun hear that Bias are
weak against beam weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0012
rows.name:
Mumun not really know how to use those,
but maybe friend can handle them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0013
rows.name:
If so, go out and lay hurt on
every Bias that comes sniffing
around door of friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0014
rows.name:
Friend needs to show zero-tolerance
policy to bullies who rough up
poor innocent Nopon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0018
rows.name: Mgaaah! Mumun gave in! Mumun gave in![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0019
rows.name:
Business take backbone. Tsumuji practically beat
this mantra into poor Mumun. But when Mumun came
face-to-face with muscleheads... Meeeeeeeh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0020
rows.name:
Next time, Mumun going to swap
in some kind of lookalike fruit
and deliver that instead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0021
rows.name:
Bias too stupid to read label on
box anyway! Meh heh heh heh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0023
rows.name:
Sphinx underneath Victory Rock is like
king of all dangerous creatures in area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0024
rows.name:
Even toughest monster makes sure to
kowtow when tiptoeing past king![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0025
rows.name:
Dorian Caravan always go through lots of
trouble to avoid royal turf of king.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0026
rows.name:
So if friend can make problem go
away, Mumun would be VERY grateful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Mumun for information about enemies in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Mumun about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0022
rows.name:
For while there, Mumun thought Bias were
going to take over Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0027
rows.name:
Good thing tough friends were
around to be Nopon bodyguards![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0028
rows.name:
Mumun hear that Bias are
weak against beam weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0034
rows.name:
Does Earth friend have one? If
so, go out there and blast Bias
bullies to bits! Ker-pow![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0029
rows.name:
Friends SURVIVED?! Mumun starting
to wonder if Growth pursuers
ripped poor friends to shreds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0030
rows.name:
Mumun have many close calls as
well. Almost got eaten 382
times before making it home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0031
rows.name:
Out of those, Mumun end up in mouth
74 times and stomach 16 times. Smell
was really, really horrible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0032
rows.name:
Mo! Eureka! Mumun need to find way to
smell bad! Then no one try to eat Mumun![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev058001_MSG0033
rows.name:
Genius Mumun just strike on
major business opportunity...[ST:wait ]
